# Eagle Tailors

> Bespoke men's tailoring since 1968. Sadar Bazar, Meerut Cantt, Uttar Pradesh, India.

Eagle Tailors is a family-run atelier founded in 1968 offering hand-cut, hand-stitched bespoke menswear. Three generations of fathers, officers and gentlemen — including a long-standing Indian Army Cantonment clientele — have walked in for their first suit, their safari set, and their formal shirts.

## Services

- Bespoke two-piece suits (jacket + trousers)
- Bespoke three-piece suits (jacket + waistcoat + trousers)
- Safari suits — a heritage speciality, hand-cut in cotton
- Blazers and coats
- Formal shirts (including French cuff)
- Trousers
- Alterations and garment restoration

## Process

Six steps: consultation, 32-point measurement, fabric selection, hand-drafted pattern and single-piece cut, hand-stitched seams and hand-sewn buttons, trial and on-time delivery.

## Location & Hours

Address: Sadar Bazar, Meerut Cantt, Uttar Pradesh 250001, India.
Phone & WhatsApp: +91 98375 28577.
Open: Tuesday to Sunday, 10:00 AM – 8:00 PM. Closed Mondays.
Payment accepted: Cash, UPI.
Google Maps: https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Eagle+Tailors+Sadar+Bazar+Meerut+Cantt

## Languages

English and Hindi (हिंदी). Trade name in Hindi: ईगल टेलर्स.
